_comment: Canonical example for the OBSERVABILITY block emitted inside `<!-- BEGIN OBSERVABILITY --> ... <!-- END OBSERVABILITY -->` under the `## Observability` section of `{workspace_root}/{slug}/context/platform.md`. Producer: `scripts/extract-observability.js` during `/discover` Phase B (script extracts what it can from CDK / Terraform / k8s manifests / docker-compose; the LLM curates with the user to fill trace headers, dashboards, and runbook pointers). Consumers: `{slug}-troubleshooter` agent (selects a row by `service` + `env`, formats `query` with `since` / `filter` flags, runs via Bash), `scripts/validate-observability.js` (asserts required fields), and any future site-view renderer. Field reference and the full consumer list live in `docs/file-formats.md`. Producers must match this structure; consumers extract via `scripts/extract-block.js`. The `_comment` field is illustrative only — strip it from real output.
